title: Chasing Monsters
subTitle: In Polynesia, Cyril tries to catch a legendary fish known to the locals as the Uruati, but he is not prepared for the incredible number of sharks lurking below the waters.

title: Walking with Dinosaurs
subTitle: Take a look at North Africa 100 million years ago. A Spinosaurus father must embark on a dangerous voyage to feed his babies. To reach his destination, he must lead his young family.

title: South Korea with Alexander Armstrong
subTitle: The host, Alexander Armstrong, explores the vibrant downtown area of Seoul and goes on an adventure in the Gangnam district.

title: Scandinavia with Simon Reeve
subTitle: The second leg of Simon's journey takes him from the fjords of Norway to Iceland, the land of fire and ice.

title: Deadly 60
subTitle: Steve Backshall heads to India on a quest to meet the planet's deadliest animals. He is on the trail of the saw-scaled viper, which is said to be the deadliest snake on Earth.

title: Deadly 60
subTitle: Steve Backshall is in India, embarking on a difficult search for the biggest of all the big cats. After several days of patient tracking, the crew finally gets a sighting.

title: Walking with Dinosaurs
subTitle: Dazzling computer animation highlights this six-hour "speculative documentary" following the lives of dinosaurs from their beginning to their zenith -- and their eventual decline during the Cretaceous period. The computer-generated imagery and animatronics used in the series show dinosaurs in a way you would expect to see in a feature film.

title: Hidden India
subTitle: India is a vast land of seasonal extremes. Monsoon rains flood the land and make it green, but once they are gone, heat and drought build. It's a challenge for all of India's animals, but it also fosters an amazing variety of landscapes.
